doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core 5-day notice requirement and 735 ILCS 5/9-209 citation are real, but the document adds fabricated details (such as the email-service provision) and does not accurately reproduce the actual statutory text.
